knowledge.html:
XIV. CONJUNCTIONS (LIÊN TỪ)

1. Liên từ kết hợp / đẳng lập

CHỨC NĂNG: La nhưng từ hoặc cụm từ dùng để nói 2 từ, 2 cụm từ hay 2 mệnh đề trong câu hoặc 2 câu với nhau.
ĐẶC ĐIỂM: Nối các từ hoặc cụm từ/nhóm từ cùng loại, hoặc nhưng mệnh đề ngang hàng nhau về mặt ngữ pháp.
For, and, nor, but, or, yet, so (FANBOYS)
  • She is a good and loyal wife.
  • He is intelligent but very lazy.
  • She says she doesn't love me, yet I still love her.
  • We work hard, or we will fail the exam.
  • The shops were closed, so I didn't get any milk.
  • He will surely succeed, for he works hard.
  • That is not what I meant to say, nor should you interpret my statement as an admission of guilt.

Lưu ý: Sau "nor" bắt buộc là 1 động từ, nên nếu chủ ngữ của 2 mệnh đề khác nhau thì khi ghep lai, phải đưa động từ hoặc hay trợ động từ dùng trước chủ ngữ của mệnh đề thu 2.

He isn't rich, nor do I imagine that he ever will be.

2. Liên từ tương quan

Cap liên từGiải thích & Ví dụ
Both...and...
(vua...vua)		Khi nói hai chủ ngữ, động từ chia số nhiều.
Both my father and my mother like dogs.
Either...or...
(hoặc...hoặc)		He likes eating both fish and meat.
You can speak either slowly or fast.
Neither...nor...
(không...mà cũng không)		She neither smokes nor drinks.
He is not only deaf but also dumb.
Not only...but also...
(không nhưng...mà còn)		Not only he but also his friend likes fish.
Either he or his sisters have been there.

Quy luật cân đối: Ve đầu mệnh đề đầu "either, neither, both, not only" dùng với loại từ nào thì ve sau mệnh đề sau "or, nor, and, but also" cũng phải dùng với loại từ do.

Quy tắc gần nhất: Neu chủ ngữ khác nhau ve so (nhiều hay ít) hay ve ngôi (person) thì động từ chia theo chủ ngữ gần nhất.

Cap liên từÝ nghĩa & Ví dụ
Whether...or...Have you made a decision about whether to go to the movies or not?
If...thenIf that is the case, then I'm not surprised about what's happening.
Not...butI don't want to do anything but sleep.
No sooner...thanS + had + no sooner + VP2 + than + S + Vqk
I had no sooner arrived home than the phone rang.
Hardly/Barely/Scarcely...whenS + had + hardly/barely/scarcely + VP2 + when/before + S + Vqk
I had hardly arrived home when the phone rang.

Đảo ngữ:

No sooner + had + S + VP2 + than + S + Vqk
Hardly/Barely/Scarcely + had + S + VP2 + when/before + S + Vqk
We had no sooner left out than they came in room.
=> No sooner had we left out than they came in room.
I had hardly arrived home when the phone rang.
=> Hardly had I arrived home when the phone rang.

3. Liên từ phụ thuộc

Liên từGiải thích & Ví dụ
Though (mặc dù)Liên từ, thường dùng đầu câu hoặc giữa câu.
Though he is poor, he is happy.
Cung là trạng từ, thường hay dùng cuối câu.
I am busy today. We could meet tomorrow, though.
Although (mặc dù)Chi dùng đầu hay giữa câu, không bao giờ dùng cuối câu.
Although/though I don't like him, I admit that he's a good manager.
Even though (cho dù)Co sắc thái ý nghĩa mạnh hon although, nói ve tính tất nhiên sẽ xảy ra du với điều kiện gi do.
You keep making that stupid noise even though I've asked you to stop three times.
Even if (thậm chí)Diễn tả 1 sự việc có khả năng xảy ra, nhưng du có hay không, cũng không anh huong den sự việc ở mệnh đề chính.
Even if she studies hard, she won't pass the exam.

exercises.question: I don't like watching animation anymore, _____ my brother is still crazy about ít.
exercises.explanation: Hai ý tưởng tương phản (tới không thich >< anh tới vẫn me) => 'but'.

exercises.question: He asked me to go _____ find his wallet in the office.
exercises.explanation: 'go and find' = di và tim. Hai hành động nối tiếp nhau => 'and'.

exercises.question: I prepared all the possible questions for the interview this morning; _____, I failed ít.
exercises.explanation: Sau đầu chậm phay + trước đầu phay => 'however' (tuy nhien). 'but' thường dùng giữa câu don.

exercises.question: Skating is a good sport for players to keep fit. _____, ít helps us to better control balance.
exercises.explanation: 'Additionally' = ngoai ra, dùng để thêm thong tin bổ sung.

exercises.question: _____ I'm watching a documentary on TV, my sister is cycling around the village with her friends.
exercises.explanation: Hai hành động xảy ra đồng thời => 'While'.

exercises.question: The teacher offered an extra test _____ the last result was bad.
exercises.explanation: 'for' = boi vì (liên từ chỉ lý do, vẫn viet). Giao vien cho thì thêm vì kết quả lan trước tệ.

exercises.question: To protect the environment, our school started a clean-up campaign _____ planted trees on the campus.
exercises.explanation: Hai hành động song song: khoi động chiến dịch + trồng cây => 'and'.

exercises.question: Folk music isn't popular among teenagers, _____ I still love its melody.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: không phổ biến >< vẫn yeu thich => 'but'.

exercises.question: My family often drink green tea _____ we already have meals.
exercises.explanation: Uong tra SAU khi an com => 'after'.

exercises.question: Spring rolls are kids' favorite food _____ they're very tasty.
exercises.explanation: Ly do (vì ngon) => 'because'.

exercises.question: Many foreign tourists enjoy _____ normal dishes and traditional ones.
exercises.explanation: 'both...and' => 'both normal dishes and traditional ones'.

exercises.question: Now, open your textbook _____ do the exercises on page 21.
exercises.explanation: Hai menh lenh nối tiếp: mo sach VA làm bai => 'and'.

exercises.question: First, add sugar to water and stir well. _____, squeeze lemonade in and your lemon juice is done.
exercises.explanation: 'First...Next' chỉ trình tự các buoc => 'Next'.

exercises.question: Remember to fasten your seatbelt _____ driving.
exercises.explanation: That đây an toan TRUOC khi lai xe => 'before'.

exercises.question: After the death of his parents, he never smiles _____ laughs.
exercises.explanation: Khong cuối và cũng không... => 'never smiles or laughs' (dùng 'or' trong câu phủ định).

exercises.question: The Vietnamese national team has won 2 silvers _____ 1 gold medals in the gymnastics.
exercises.explanation: 2 huy chương bac VA 1 vang => 'and'.

exercises.question: I know that staying up late is a bad habit, _____ I can't give up ít.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: biet là xau NHUNG không bỏ được => 'but'.

exercises.question: My father is a photographer who _____ writes books.
exercises.explanation: 'also' = cũng, dùng bổ sung thong tin: là nhiep anh giá CUNG là viet sach.

exercises.question: I and my friends will go out tonight, _____ I have to finish all my homework before that.
exercises.explanation: Toi sẽ đi chơi => VY VAY phải làm bai xong trước => 'so'.

exercises.question: Maria blew out candles on birthday cake and _____ made a wish.
exercises.explanation: Thoi nên SAU DO ước nguyen => 'and then'.

exercises.wrongSentence: She didn't understand what you said because of she was deaf.
exercises.correctSentence: She didn't understand what you said because she was deaf.
exercises.explanation: Sau 'because of' là danh từ/cum danh từ. Truoc mệnh đề (she was deaf) phải dùng 'because'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Although he was very bad-tempered, but everybody liked him.
exercises.correctSentence: Although he was very bad-tempered, everybody liked him.
exercises.explanation: 'Although' và 'but' không dùng cũng nhau. Bo 'but'.

exercises.wrongSentence: In spite of her obvious intelligence, she finds ít difficulty to express her ideas in writing.
exercises.correctSentence: In spite of her obvious intelligence, she finds ít difficult to express her ideas in writing.
exercises.explanation: 'find it + adj + to V' => dùng tính từ 'difficult', không phải danh từ 'difficulty'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Next week, when there will be an English club held here, I will give you more information about ít.
exercises.correctSentence: Next week, when there is an English club held here, I will give you more information about ít.
exercises.explanation: Trong mệnh đề trạng ngu chỉ thời gian (when...), dùng thì hiện tại, không dùng 'will'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Because I knew her family well so I tried to help her.
exercises.correctSentence: Because I knew her family well, I tried to help her.
exercises.explanation: 'Because' và 'so' không dùng cũng nhau. Bo 'so'.

exercises.original: The child hates getting up in the morning. He also dislikes going to bed at night.
exercises.answer: The child hates getting up in the morning and also dislikes going to bed at night.
exercises.explanation: Hai y bổ sung nhau => nói bang 'and'.

exercises.original: He is talented. He also has a charm.
exercises.answer: He is talented and also has a charm.
exercises.explanation: Hai tính chat bổ sung => 'and'.

exercises.original: The street is lined with oak trees. It is also lined with elm trees.
exercises.answer: The street is lined with oak trees and elm trees.
exercises.explanation: Gop hai thành phan giống nhau bang 'and'.

exercises.original: The lecture was long. In addition, it was also a boring lecture.
exercises.answer: The lecture was long and boring.
exercises.explanation: Gop hai tính từ bổ sung: long and boring.

exercises.original: We know him. We don't know his friends.
exercises.answer: We know him but we don't know his friends.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: biet anh ta NHUNG không biet bạn anh ta => 'but'.

exercises.original: They may leave today. They also may leave tomorrow.
exercises.answer: They may leave today or tomorrow.
exercises.explanation: Hai khả năng lua chon => 'or'.

exercises.original: I ấm proud to be here. I ấm also happy to meet you here.
exercises.answer: I ấm proud to be here and happy to meet you here.
exercises.explanation: Hai cảm xúc bổ sung => 'and'.

exercises.original: You don't do your homework. You will get a bad mark. You will be kicked out of school.
exercises.answer: If you don't do your homework, you will get a bad mark and you will be kicked out of school.
exercises.explanation: Dieu kien (if) + hai kết quả nói bang 'and'.

exercises.original: The young boy was sent home. He refused to obey the teacher.
exercises.answer: The young boy refused to obey the teacher. Therefore, he was sent home.
exercises.explanation: Ly do trước, kết quả sau. 'Therefore' = vì vậy.

exercises.original: It cost a fortune to renovate our house. It was worth ít.
exercises.answer: It cost a fortune to renovate our house. However, it was worth ít.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: tốn nhiều tien NHUNG đang giá => 'However'.

exercises.original: He produces things quite slowly. His products are really good.
exercises.answer: He produces things quite slowly, but his products are really good.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: làm chậm NHUNG sản phẩm tốt => 'but'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Because the temperature is below freezing, ít actually feels quite warm when the sun is out.
exercises.correctSentence: Although the temperature is below freezing, ít actually feels quite warm when the sun is out.
exercises.explanation: Hai mệnh đề tương phản (nhiệt độ thấp NHUNG cảm thấy ấm) => 'Although'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Despite Wayne failed to score himself, he helped Ron score two goals.
exercises.correctSentence: Although Wayne failed to score himself, he helped Ron score two goals.
exercises.explanation: 'Despite' + danh từ/V-ing. Truoc mệnh đề (S+V) phải dùng 'Although'.

exercises.wrongSentence: While horse riding is an expensive pastime, but more and more people are taking ít up.
exercises.correctSentence: While horse riding is an expensive pastime, more and more people are taking ít up.
exercises.explanation: 'While' (trong khi/mặc dù) và 'but' không dùng cũng nhau. Bo 'but'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Once I read the whole passage, I understood what the author meant in the first few lines.
exercises.correctSentence: Once I had read the whole passage, I understood what the author meant in the first few lines.
exercises.explanation: 'Once' chỉ hành động hoan tất trước hành động khác => dùng quá khứ hoàn thành: 'had read'.

exercises.wrongSentence: Because your train leaves in half an hour, so you'd better hurry.
exercises.correctSentence: Because your train leaves in half an hour, you'd better hurry.
exercises.explanation: 'Because' và 'so' không dùng cũng nhau. Bo 'so'.

exercises.original: You should choose: One, eat less; two, do more exercises.
exercises.answer: You should eat less and do more exercises.
exercises.explanation: Gop hai lời khuyên bang 'and'.

exercises.original: The train proceeded quickly. The train proceeded smoothly.
exercises.answer: The train proceeded quickly and smoothly.
exercises.explanation: Gop hai trạng từ bang 'and'.

exercises.original: The town is historical. It is picturesque too.
exercises.answer: The town is historical and picturesque.
exercises.explanation: Gop hai tính từ bang 'and'.

exercises.original: The students easily got high score in the last examination. They were well-prepared.
exercises.answer: The students were well-prepared, so they easily got high score in the last examination.
exercises.explanation: Ly do trước, kết quả sau. 'so' = vì vậy.

exercises.original: It was raining. We still went to the park.
exercises.answer: It was raining. However, we still went to the park.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: troi mua NHUNG vẫn di cong vien => 'However'.

exercises.original: She put on a warm coat before going to work. The weather is cold.
exercises.answer: The weather is cold. Therefore, she put on a warm coat before going to work.
exercises.explanation: Ly do (trời lạnh) => kết quả (mac ao ấm). 'Therefore' = vì vậy.

exercises.original: She was thinking of buying a new car. Her friend convinced her to buy an used car.
exercises.answer: She was thinking of buying a new car, but her friend convinced her to buy an used car.
exercises.explanation: Tương phản: muộn mua xe moi NHUNG bạn thuyet phuc mua xe cũ => 'but'.

exercises.original: She is loved by everybody in her factory. She is a very hard worker.
exercises.answer: She is a very hard worker, so she is loved by everybody in her factory.
exercises.explanation: Ly do (làm viec chăm chỉ) => kết quả (được yêu quý) => 'so'.

exercises.original: I felt really sick last night. I couldn't come to your party.
exercises.answer: I felt really sick last night, so I couldn't come to your party.
exercises.explanation: Ly do (bị ốm) => kết quả (không den tiec) => 'so'.
